result:
Done. Here's what shipped:

| Area | Change | Impact |
|---|---|---|
| **Layout width** | `max-w-[430px]` → `max-w-[420px]` | Snug fit for Edge 40's ~390–420px CSS viewport |
| **Map animations** | `treasure-glow` / `current-pulse` rewritten from `box-shadow` to `transform`+`opacity` | Eliminates per-frame repaint on all map nodes — biggest win on mid-range GPU |
| **All animations** | Added `will-change: transform/opacity` | Browser pre-promotes to compositor layer before first frame, no jank on load |
| **Battery / a11y** | `prefers-reduced-motion` disables all decorative animations | Works with Android battery saver mode |
| **Touch delay** | `touch-action: manipulation` on all buttons/links/inputs | Kills 300ms tap delay on Android Chrome, no JS needed |
| **Status bar** | `theme-color: #060d1f` meta tag | Android Chrome status bar matches the dark ocean background |
| **Haptics** | `navigator.vibrate` — 8ms on correct, `[15,40,15]` on wrong, `[50,50,100]` on heap complete | Tactile feedback for mid-play decisions |
| **Keyboard** | `enterKeyHint="done"` on answer input | Android keyboard shows "Done" instead of "Return" |
| **Bundle** | `reactStrictMode`, `compress: true` in next.config | Catches double-render issues; ensures gzip in all environments |

The SVGs in `/public` are unused Next.js template files — no actual images are loaded by the app, so there was nothing to compress or lazy-load there.
